name: The Room Of Quasimodo
description:
You are in a small room with a straw bed, you can see some wood figures with
human form, you deduce that this room is from the man who is screaming in the
steeple. You feel a cold air that cames from the arch window that is at your
left. You recognize some of the figures, one is of the cardenal, and the other
one is from a woman that you saw in the forest.
